title: 有馬記念の後に・感謝と誓いを共にして

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was so certain I would top the year off with a
brilliant victory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! My pride won't allow any loss to stop
me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whoever gets the final victory is the real winner!
Next time, I'll take center stage for sure!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like you're hyped already. No loss is
gonna bring you down.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Why would I give up because of
something like this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, that thought never crossed my mind.
Nyahaha!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Then there was no need to say anything,
was there?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei! King! Preparations for the winning concert are
about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's almost time. What are you going to do, King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Are you serious? I'm going too, of course.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is the last chance of the year to face my fans
and express my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I always give it my all, no matter the
circumstance. It's what makes me a true king.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that sounded so cool!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Please give a little extra and pick up my slack!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Sky! The stage is the other way! Don't think you
can run away!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Let's get on with it, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, who put King in charge?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehehe... I'll be the one to light the final
fireworks of the year!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. I can imagine it now, like a great flower
blooming in the midst of winter. How wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Let's make it a performance to remember!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As if I'd do anything else!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All the fans will remember that we were the ones who made a mark at the Arima Kinen this year!

And so, they go on to perform the most
spectacular winning concert of the entire year.
